skills.name: generate-shades
skills.description: Generate a full perceptual OKLCH ramp plus an 11-stop Tailwind scale (50-950) for any color via the free no-auth UIshades JSON API or generate_shades MCP tool.

skills.name: color-conversion
skills.description: Normalize any color to a canonical lowercase hex and read its exact OKLCH coordinates and WCAG contrast via the free no-auth UIshades JSON API or generate_shades MCP tool.
